arts.ttl: Why are Chelsea and Tottenham games kicking off at 7pm today?
arts.sum: There are four games taking place in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Petit Thinks Three Players Can Stop Cole Palmer Winning Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: The former midfielder believes Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappe is among Cole Palmer's biggest rivals for a Ballon d'Or in the future.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea will listen to offers for £30m player in January with Enzo Maresca now prepared to let him go
arts.sum: He's not started one Premier League game.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca grants Chelsea emotional transfer reunion on one condition as 'interest' confirmed
arts.sum: The Mirror now report that Chelsea are willing to allow both Dewsbury-Hall and fellow midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka leave the club on loan in January, with the report adding that Leicester have registered an ‘interest’ in taking their former midfielder back on a temporary deal. Chelsea midfielder Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall could return to boyhood club Leicester City in the January transfer window, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella and Puma react perfectly to viral Chelsea blunder in Tottenham win
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella and Puma have launched a new genius campaign after the Chelsea star couldn't stop slipping in their win over Tottenham last weekend. Puma took to social media to post an image of Cucurella stood next to a "Caution wet floor' sign - which had been customised to feature the Spaniard's iconic hairstyle.

arts.ttl: 'Chelsea rejected me in the summer - now I'm out to show up Enzo Maresca'
arts.sum: A familiar face returns to Stamford Bridge on Sunday - and he has more reason than most to want to get one over on Enzo Maresca, considering he could have had his job

arts.ttl: Chelsea should now consider selling £39m player who's being linked to Premier League rivals - opinion
arts.sum: He's low in the pecking order.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brentford Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: A fascinating clash awaits us at Stamford Bridge on December 15th, 19:00 GMT, as Chelsea host Brentford. Can the Blues continue their impressive recent form, or will the Bees pull off another upset ag...

arts.ttl: La Liga outfit looking to raid Chelsea for 21-year-old prodigy
arts.sum: Real Betis are keen on signing the Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei. According to a report from Fichajes, Real Betis are looking to improve their midfield options and they are keen on signing the promising Chelsea youngster. In addition to that, they are keeping tabs on the West Ham United midfielder Guido Rodriguez as well. arts.ttl: Is Premier League title race between Liverpool and Chelsea?
arts.sum: Final Score's Ellen White and Glenn Murray discuss the latest results in the Premier League and what they mean in the title race for Liverpool, Chelsea and Arsenal.
